title: managed_database_instance
description: One managed relational database instance on any cloud — AWS RDS, GCP Cloud SQL, Azure Database. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for encryption, access, backup, and redundancy checks. Providers set additionalProperties for vendor-specific fields.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (AWS: DB instance identifier, GCP: instance name).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

engine.description: Database engine: mysql, postgres, sqlserver, etc.

publicly_accessible.description: Instance is reachable from the public internet.

ssl_required.description: SSL/TLS is required for all connections.

multi_az.description: Instance is deployed across multiple availability zones.

kms_key_id.description: KMS key ID used for encryption (if customer-managed).
